settings.heading: FABRIC & CARE
settings.content: 100% Heavyweight French Terry Cotton. 500 GSM density for structural integrity.

settings.heading: FIT PROFILE
settings.content: Designed with an aggressive, oversized block. Dropped shoulders, cropped body length, and a dramatically enlarged hood to obscure the profile.

settings.heading: SHIPPING & RETURNS
settings.content: Preorders will commence dispatch in Q4. Due to the nature of this artifact, all sales are final.
